name: Settings: Add Library: Check of the added libraries sorting
fullName: Manage Libraries: Settings: Add Library: Check of the added libraries sorting

steps.name: When  I add "Palace Bookshelf" account from welcomeScreen
And  I add libraries through settings:
And  I open Libraries on settings screen
Then  Libraries are sorted in alphabetical order on libraries screen
When  I click to 'Escondido Public Library' and save library name as 'libraryInfo' on libraries screen
Then  The screen with settings for 'libraryInfo' library is opened

labels.name: story
labels.value: Settings: Add Library: Check of the added libraries sorting

labels.name: testClass
labels.value: Settings: Add Library: Check of the added libraries sorting
